---
title: "Final"
author: "Zhibo Yang"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",  # includes dplyr, tidyr, readr, ggplot2, etc.
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "readr",
  "ggplot2",
  "psych",
  "car",
  "effsize",
  "rstatix",
  "coin"
)

installed <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(!installed)) {
  install.packages(packages[!installed])
}

invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))

Q_A <- read.csv(
  "../Data/A_135.csv",
  fileEncoding = "GB18030",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

Q_B <- read.csv(
  "../Data/B_135.csv",
  fileEncoding = "GB18030",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

Q_A <- Q_A %>%
  mutate(
    Group = "A",
    Ad_Type = "Informational"
  )

Q_B <- Q_B %>%
  mutate(
    Group = "B",
    Ad_Type = "Transformational"
  )

data_all <- bind_rows(Q_A, Q_B)

data_all <- data_all %>%
  rename(
    ID = 序号,
    Gender = Q21,
    Age = Q22
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("A", "B")),
    Ad_Type = factor(
      Ad_Type,
      levels = c("Informational", "Transformational")
    ),
    Gender = factor(Gender),
    Age = factor(Age)
  )

question_items <- paste0("Q", 1:20)
purchase_items <- paste0("Q", 1:5)
ad_attitude_items <- paste0("Q", 6:9)
informational_check_items <- c("Q17", "Q18")
transformational_check_items <- c("Q19", "Q20")

data_all <- data_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(question_items), as.numeric))

required_items <- c(
  question_items,
  purchase_items,
  ad_attitude_items,
  informational_check_items,
  transformational_check_items
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_items, names(data_all))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

missing_summary <- data_all %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.))))

range_check <- data_all %>%
  summarise(across(
    all_of(question_items),
    list(
      min = ~ min(., na.rm = TRUE),
      max = ~ max(., na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  ))

duplicate_rows <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group, ID) %>%
  filter(n() > 1) %>%
  ungroup()

gender_table <- data_all %>%
  count(Group, Gender) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  mutate(Percent = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2)) %>%
  ungroup()

age_table <- data_all %>%
  count(Group, Age) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  mutate(Percent = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2)) %>%
  ungroup()

data_all <- data_all %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Total_Score = sum(c_across(all_of(question_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Score = mean(c_across(all_of(question_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Purchase_Intention_Mean = mean(c_across(all_of(purchase_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Purchase_Intention_Median = median(c_across(all_of(purchase_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Ad_Attitude_Median = median(c_across(all_of(ad_attitude_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Informational_Check = median(c_across(all_of(informational_check_items)), na.rm = TRUE),
    Transformational_Check = median(c_across(all_of(transformational_check_items)), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

data_long <- data_all %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_items),
    names_to = "Question",
    values_to = "Score"
  )

item_mean_long <- data_long %>%
  group_by(Group, Question) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean = round(mean(Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD = round(sd(Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    N = sum(!is.na(Score)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

group_score_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean_Total = round(mean(Total_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Total = round(sd(Total_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Mean_Score = round(mean(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Score = round(sd(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

item_t_tests <- data_long %>%
  group_by(Question) %>%
  summarise(
    Mean_A = round(mean(Score[Group == "A"], na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Mean_B = round(mean(Score[Group == "B"], na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    p_value = round(t.test(Score ~ Group)$p.value, 4),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

gender_score_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group, Gender) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean_Score = round(mean(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Score = round(sd(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

age_score_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group, Age) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean_Score = round(mean(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Score = round(sd(Mean_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

missing_summary
range_check
duplicate_rows
gender_table
age_table
group_score_summary
item_mean_long
item_t_tests
gender_score_summary
age_score_summary

alpha_ad_attitude <- psych::alpha(data_all %>% select(all_of(ad_attitude_items)))
print(alpha_ad_attitude)

h1_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Median = median(Purchase_Intention_Mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(Purchase_Intention_Mean, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Purchase_Intention_Mean, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Purchase_Intention_Mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean = mean(Purchase_Intention_Mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    SD = sd(Purchase_Intention_Mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(h1_summary)

h1_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  Purchase_Intention_Median ~ Group,
  data = data_all,
  alternative = "two.sided",
  exact = FALSE,
  correct = TRUE
)

print(h1_wilcox)

h1_effect_size_r <- data_all %>%
  wilcox_effsize(
    Purchase_Intention_Mean ~ Group,
    alternative = "two.sided"
  )

print(h1_effect_size_r)

h1_cliff_delta <- effsize::cliff.delta(
  Purchase_Intention_Mean ~ Group,
  data = data_all
)

print(h1_cliff_delta)

h1_normality <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  shapiro_test(Purchase_Intention_Mean)

print(h1_normality)

h1_levene <- car::leveneTest(
  Purchase_Intention_Mean ~ Group,
  data = data_all
)

print(h1_levene)

ggplot(data_all, aes(x = Group, y = Purchase_Intention_Mean)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "H1: Purchase Intention Mean by Group",
    x = "Group",
    y = "Purchase Intention Mean"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

h2_summary <- data_all %>%
  group_by(Ad_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Median_PI = median(Purchase_Intention_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1_PI = quantile(Purchase_Intention_Median, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3_PI = quantile(Purchase_Intention_Median, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_PI = IQR(Purchase_Intention_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_Informational_Check = median(Informational_Check, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median_Transformational_Check = median(Transformational_Check, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(h2_summary)

h2_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  Purchase_Intention_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data_all,
  alternative = "less",
  exact = FALSE,
  correct = TRUE
)

print(h2_wilcox)

h2_effect_size <- data_all %>%
  wilcox_effsize(
    Purchase_Intention_Median ~ Ad_Type,
    alternative = "less"
  )

print(h2_effect_size)

h2_cliff_delta <- effsize::cliff.delta(
  Purchase_Intention_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data_all
)

print(h2_cliff_delta)

ggplot(data_all, aes(x = Ad_Type, y = Purchase_Intention_Median)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "H2: Purchase Intention Median by Advertising Type",
    x = "Advertising Type",
    y = "Purchase Intention Median"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

h3_rank_data <- data_all %>%
  mutate(
    Ad_Attitude_Rank = rank(
      Ad_Attitude_Median,
      ties.method = "average"
    )
  )

h3_summary <- h3_rank_data %>%
  group_by(Ad_Type) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Median = median(Ad_Attitude_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q1 = quantile(Ad_Attitude_Median, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Ad_Attitude_Median, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(Ad_Attitude_Median, na.rm = TRUE),
    Mean_Rank = mean(Ad_Attitude_Rank, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(h3_summary)

h3_wilcox <- wilcox.test(
  Ad_Attitude_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data_all,
  alternative = "less",
  exact = FALSE,
  correct = TRUE
)

print(h3_wilcox)

h3_effect_size <- data_all %>%
  wilcox_effsize(
    Ad_Attitude_Median ~ Ad_Type,
    alternative = "less"
  )

print(h3_effect_size)

h3_cliff_delta <- effsize::cliff.delta(
  Ad_Attitude_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data_all
)

print(h3_cliff_delta)

h3_coin_test <- coin::wilcox_test(
  Ad_Attitude_Median ~ Ad_Type,
  data = data_all,
  alternative = "less",
  distribution = "asymptotic"
)

print(h3_coin_test)

ggplot(data_all, aes(x = Ad_Type, y = Ad_Attitude_Median)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.5) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "H3: Advertisement Attitude by Advertising Type",
    x = "Advertising Type",
    y = "Advertisement Attitude Median"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

hypothesis_summary <- tibble(
  Hypothesis = c("H1", "H2", "H3"),
  Dependent_Variable = c(
    "Purchase_Intention_Mean: mean of Q1-Q5",
    "Purchase_Intention_Median: median of Q1-Q5",
    "Ad_Attitude_Median: median of Q6-Q9"
  ),
  Grouping_Variable = c(
    "Group: A vs B",
    "Ad_Type: Informational vs Transformational",
    "Ad_Type: Informational vs Transformational"
  ),
  Test = c(
    "Wilcoxon rank-sum test, two-sided",
    "Wilcoxon rank-sum test, one-sided: Informational < Transformational",
    "Wilcoxon rank-sum test, one-sided: Informational < Transformational"
  ),
  P_Value = c(
    h1_wilcox$p.value,
    h2_wilcox$p.value,
    h3_wilcox$p.value
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    P_Value = round(P_Value, 4),
    Decision_0.05 = if_else(
      P_Value < 0.05,
      "Significant",
      "Not significant"
    )
  )

print(hypothesis_summary)

```

```
